title: ononis viscosa proles brachycarpa
intro: Ononis viscosa proles brachycarpa, also known as the sticky restharrow, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ononis viscosa proles brachycarpa include its potential to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a decoction or infusion, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
